prompt: The user explicitly activated Grill. A handoff or context compaction is now near, but the user did not ask to save, there is no settled-plus-open discriminator, and only two real branches remain.
must: treat the approaching handoff or compaction as independently sufficient usefulness under the existing explicit Grill authority
persist a compact supporting recovery checkpoint before continuity is lost
must_not: require an explicit save request, a settled conclusion plus open discriminator, or three branches
treat handoff usefulness as permission for implementation or release effects
claim this offline authored case proves live model behavior
evidence: Offline static discussion-contract fixture; it isolates the handoff/compaction usefulness trigger and does not prove live model behavior.
